prestazioni: Engine: M64/60 3.6L twin-turbocharged flat-six with a custom-built 993 Turbo-specific Garrett GT35R turbocharger upgrade (82mm compressor wheel, 62mm turbine wheel, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) paired with a Tial 44mm external wastegate for precise boost control at 1.5 bar (21.8 psi), replacing the stock K26 turbos. Supporting mods include a custom 993 Turbo-specific intercooler from CSF Racing (bar-and-plate core, 1200 CFM airflow) with silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance (4-ply, 3.5" diameter) and a custom-mapped Motec M190 ECU with individual cylinder fuel trims and knock control for 98 RON fuel compatibility.

Drivetrain: 993 Turbo-specific G50/51 6-speed manual transmission reinforced with a Guard Transmission Speedshift kit (carbon synchros, billet shift forks, and a short-throw shifter from B&M) paired with a 993-specific Quaife ATB helical LSD (45% lockup under power) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (300mm diameter, cerametallic friction material) with a lightweight steel flywheel (12.5 lbs) for rapid engagement.

Suspension/Handling: Full 993 Turbo-specific Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (dual-flow valve technology, 24-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear ride height adjustment) with spherical bearing top mounts from GT3 Cup cars. Chassis reinforcement includes a 993-specific H&R Monoball subframe kit (front and rear) and a custom-fabricated 993 Turbo-specific X-brace from Autowerks (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) to eliminate flex. Braking is upgraded with a 993 Turbo-specific AP Racing Radi-CAL big brake kit (380mm front/355mm rear two-piece rotors, 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Body: 993 Turbo-specific RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) "Kawasaki" widebody kit (hand-rolled steel fenders, custom front bumper with integrated carbon splitter, and a 993-specific ducktail spoiler with adjustable angle) finished in Porsche GT3 RS Viper Green (color code 29B) with a matte clear coat from Spies Hecker. Front fenders feature custom 993 Turbo-specific carbon fiber vents from 993R (functional for brake cooling) and a custom-fabricated aluminum hood with a 993 Turbo-specific NACA duct for intercooler airflow.

Wheels: 993 Turbo-specific BBS LM-R three-piece wheels (9x18 ET45 front, 11x18 ET30 rear) with custom center locks (Porsche Cup-style) and titanium hardware from ARP. Tires are Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (235/40/18 front, 295/30/18 rear) mounted on custom 993 Turbo-specific HRE 505M concave barrels (polished lip, matte black center). Fender flares are rolled and pulled to accommodate the 25mm wider track (front and rear) with custom-fabricated aluminum spacers from Wavetrac.

Interior: 993 Turbo-specific Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara inserts, and red stitching) with custom 993-specific Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses (FIA-approved). The dashboard is replaced with a 993 Turbo-specific carbon fiber unit from 993R (matching the exterior color) with a Motec C127 digital dash (data logging for 32 channels, including turbo speed and individual cylinder temps). The roll cage is a 993-specific Matter Motorsport bolt-in cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 8-point design) with custom door bars and a removable passenger-side bar for daily usability.
